tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows evidence of impaired renal function (elevated creatinine, significant proteinuria, low urine specific gravity), hypoglycemia with low HbA1c, and mild metabolic acidosis (low CO₂, high chloride). Urine findings (cloudy, brown, ammoniacal) suggest possible renal or hepatic involvement, but no clear infection. Further nephrological and metabolic evaluation is recommended.

display.value: Proteinuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Microalbuminuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus
Nonproliferative retinopathy due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Retinopathy due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
